tasks.instruction: The academic cap picked up a red accent. Put it back as a plain black outline.
The adjustment sliders should not be blue. Restore the standard monochrome outline.
The vertical adjustment control has an accidental green tint. Make it look like a normal outline icon again.
The archive download icon was highlighted yellow by mistake. Return it to the usual black outline.
The archive removal icon has a purple cast. Remove the tint and keep the outline style.
The archive box should be a neutral outline, not orange. Restore its default look.
The at-sign has a pink tint that does not belong. Make it a clean black outline again.
The backspace icon's lines look too bold. Bring the outline weight back to normal.
The banknotes icon is too faint to match the set. Restore the usual line weight.
The empty battery outline is heavier than it should be. Match the normal icon weight.
The full battery icon looks unusually delicate. Restore the standard outline thickness.
The half battery icon has oversized strokes. Make the line weight consistent with the default set.
The beaker is undersized on the canvas. Restore its normal centered presence.
The alert bell is crowding the canvas. Resize it back to the standard icon fit.
The muted bell looks shrunken. Return it to the usual centered scale.
The snooze bell is slightly too large for the canvas. Restore the balanced icon size.
The regular bell no longer matches the icon set's sizing. Put it back to the normal fit.
The bold text icon is cropped. Fix the canvas so the entire mark is visible.
The disabled lightning bolt is cut off at the edges. Restore the full visible icon.
The lightning bolt does not fit inside its viewport. Make the complete outline show again.
The open book has been colored cyan. Return it to a simple black outline.
The slashed bookmark's outline is barely visible. Restore the normal stroke weight.
The square bookmark is a little oversized. Bring it back to the standard centered scale.
The bookmark is partly outside the visible area. Repair the viewport so the whole shape appears.
The briefcase picked up a red tint. Restore the icon to the neutral outline style.
The house lost its roof. Rebuild the missing top piece.
The face has eyes and cheeks but no smile. Add the missing mouth back.
The car body is missing its windshield. Restore the glass area.
The birthday cake needs its candle restored on top.
The rocket is missing its round porthole. Put the window back.
A stray blue spot was added to the house wall. Remove the unwanted mark.
The smiley has an extra eyebrow-like stroke above one eye. Clean it off.
The clock face has a stray side tick that should not be there. Remove the extra mark.
A loose rock appeared in the water under the boat. Delete the stray shape.
The flower has an extra petal that breaks the simple four-petal bloom. Remove it.
The front door slid away from the center of the house. Move it back into place.
The car's right wheel floated upward. Put it back under the body.
The leafy crown no longer sits on the trunk. Recenter it above the tree.
The cup handle drifted into the body. Move it back to the outside edge.
The rocket flame is tucked too high into the body. Place it back underneath.
The house window no longer reads as glass. Restore its original window color.
The left cheek blush turned into a dark mark. Restore the soft blush color.
The fruit on the right blends into the leaves. Make it match the other fruit again.
The sail was painted like the water. Restore the sail's warm color.
The rocket nose cone lost its accent color. Repaint it to match the fins.
The face has one eye mark too many. Remove the copied eye.
A second minute hand was copied onto the clock. Keep only the intended hand.
The car has an extra wheel mark near the left side. Remove the duplicate.
There is one steam wisp too many above the cup. Delete the copied wisp.
A second leaf was accidentally added to the stem. Remove the duplicate leaf.
The sail leans the wrong way. Flip it back so it attaches naturally to the mast.
The left fin faces inward instead of bracing the rocket. Turn it back around.
The right fin is mirrored away from its proper stance. Restore its orientation.
The left steam curl bends the wrong direction. Mirror it back into the rising steam pattern.
The small corner star has been mirrored. Restore its original sparkle shape.
Fix the house details: the window color is wrong and the chimney was copied.
Repair the car's front details by restoring the headlight and bringing back the plate.
Clean up the clock face: the center dot color is wrong and one side mark was duplicated.
Restore the tree's fruit details: one fruit moved and another lost its ripe color.
Finish repairing the cake by restoring the cherry and the white frosting.
The bug icon is both tinted and cropped. Restore the plain outline and make the full insect visible.
The library building icon has the wrong color and weight. Bring it back to the standard black outline style.
The office tower looks shrunken and too heavy. Restore its normal size and outline balance.
The office building was recolored and clipped. Return the black outline and show the entire icon.
The storefront icon is oversized and too faint. Restore the usual centered outline appearance.
The cake icon should not be colored or extra bold. Reset it to the standard outline style.
The calculator icon is tinted and partly cut off. Make it a complete neutral outline again.
The date-range calendar has the wrong size and line weight. Put it back into the default icon style.
The calendar days icon is colored and too heavy. Restore the regular black outline.
The calendar is both green and cropped. Return it to a full black outline icon.
The camera is mis-sized and clipped by its canvas. Restore the normal fit with the whole camera visible.
The chart tile has an unwanted blue tint and thin lines. Restore the default outline treatment.
The bar chart looks too small and too bold. Bring it back to the normal icon proportions.
The pie chart icon was tinted and cropped. Restore the complete black outline.
The text chat bubble has the wrong line weight and is cut off. Fix the outline and viewport together.
The centered chat bubble is tinted and no longer fits the canvas correctly. Restore the default look.
The chat bubble with ellipsis has the wrong color and heavy strokes. Return it to the regular outline style.
The left-right chat icon is oversized and clipped. Make it fit normally with no edges cut off.
The single chat bubble is purple and cropped. Restore the full neutral outline.
The oval chat bubble has a stray tint and weak strokes. Put it back to the default outline weight and color.
Finish the basic house silhouette by adding the roof.
Add the chimney that belongs on the roof.
Give the face its first eye.
Add the smile so the expression reads happy.
Add the top tick mark to start the clock face.
Add the shorter hand pointing upward from the center.
Build the top cabin of the car.
Add the second wheel so the car stands evenly.
Add the leafy canopy above the trunk.
Place one small fruit in the open space on the lower crown.
Add the lower cake layer on the plate.
Put a candle on top of the cake.
Raise the mast from the boat.
Add the sail attached to the mast.
Set the cup on a saucer.
Add steam rising above the cup.
Add the first petal above the stem.
Complete the bloom with its center.
Cap the rocket with a nose cone.
Add the flame below the rocket.
